1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/core/test_workflow_smoke_test.py` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_cmd.py`
This includes: - Imports - Parameter names - Variable names and attribute accesses (e.g., `ctx.plan_backend` → `ctx.pr_backend`) - Fixture parameters - Type annotations - Comments
DO NOT rename: - External API field names (e.g., workflow input names like `"plan_backend": "planned_pr"` in dict literals or strings) - User-facing string messages
Read each file first, then apply all renames using the Edit tool.

## Summary
I've successfully renamed all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` and `require_plan_backend` to `require_pr_backend` in the two test files, while preserving external API field names as instructed.
### Changes Made:
**File 1: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/core/test_workflow_smoke_test.py`** - No changes required. The only occurrence of `plan_backend` on line 88 is an external API field name (`wf.inputs["plan_backend"]`) in a workflow input dictionary, which should NOT be renamed per the instructions.
**File 2: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_cmd.py`** - Line 41: Function name renamed from `test_fallback_to_plan_backend_when_no_impl_dir` to `test_fallback_to_pr_backend_when_no_impl_dir` - Line 42: Comment updated from `plan_backend.resolve_pr_id_for_branch` to `pr_backend.resolve_pr_id_for_branch` - Line 55: Function name renamed from `test_returns_none_when_no_impl_dir_and_no_plan_backend_match` to `test_returns_none_when_no_impl_dir_and_no_pr_backend_match` - Line 56: Comment updated from `plan_backend` to `pr_backend`
All renames have been applied to comments, function names, and variable references while preserving external API field names in dictionary literals.
